name: Google Earth
description: Virtual globe and geospatial exploration platform that renders Earth from satellite imagery, aerial photography and 3D terrain.

years.notes: Web/Android era globe icon introduced late 2013 (used through 2017). Stylized cream continents over a blue globe with a diagonal lighter-blue highlight band. Redrawn to a 24x24 viewBox via scale(0.0005886) over the native 40777x40777 CorelDRAW source; stray off-canvas rects and duplicate polygons dropped.

Current crescent globe mark introduced 18 April 2017 with Google Earth 9 (web + mobile rebrand). Stacked blue wave bands form a globe with a white crescent shadow. Redrawn to a 24x24 viewBox via scale(0.005356) over the native 4481x4482 source; decorative radial-gradient inner glow and ±20% white/dark bezel overlays were dropped as they are imperceptible at icon scale.
